name: White Salsa Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 6-ounce can pitted black olives, drained and coarsely chopped
5 Tablespoons hot pepper sauce, or to taste
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise and sour cream.
2. Add the lime juice, garlic, cilantro, black olives, scallions, hot pepper sauce, salt, and white pepper.
3. Mix gently until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop before serving.
